purpose: Primary user interface for coffee machine product selection and dispensing control

outputs.name: product_button_pressed
outputs.description: Selected product type (espresso, cappuccino, latte, americano, hot water, etc.)

outputs.name: manual_stop_pressed
outputs.description: Boolean indicating if manual stop was pressed

outputs.name: product_type
outputs.description: Type of product selected (espresso, cappuccino, hot water, etc.)

outputs.name: double_product
outputs.description: Boolean indicating if double product was selected

outputs.name: manual_stop_triggered
outputs.description: Boolean indicating if manual stop was triggered

states.name: surface_cleanliness
states.description: Screen surface cleanliness degrading with use and contamination

events.name: action_required_indicator
events.description: Blinking button indicates user needs to perform an action due to degraded interface

parameters.name: surface_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for surface cleanliness degradation

parameters.name: usage_intensity
parameters.description: Base usage intensity factor for degradation

parameters.name: action_required_threshold
parameters.description: Surface cleanliness threshold below which action is required

state_transition_logic: surface_cleanliness decreases by (surface_cleanliness / surface_degradation_timescale) * usage_intensity * dt
output_logic: All touch screen outputs are generated based on user interactions
Output reliability and accuracy decrease as surface_cleanliness degrades
When surface_cleanliness is below action_required_threshold, interface responsiveness may be compromised
event_logic: action_required_indicator triggers when surface_cleanliness falls below action_required_threshold
assumptions: Touch screen degradation is primarily driven by surface contamination from user interactions
Interface functionality remains operational even with degraded surface cleanliness
User interaction patterns are relatively consistent over time
Surface contamination accumulates gradually with each use
